# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = { runtime: 'edge' };

type FeatureFlags = Record<string, boolean>;

type AppConfig = {
  apiKey: string;
  dbUrl: string;
  featureFlags: FeatureFlags;
};

const DEFAULTS: AppConfig = {
  apiKey: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  dbUrl: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  featureFlags: {},
};

const EDGE_CONFIG_ID = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

async function readString(key: string): Promise<string | undefined> {
  try {
    const val = await get<string>(key);
    return typeof val === 'string' ? val : undefined;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

async function readFeatureFlags(key: string): Promise<FeatureFlags | undefined> {
  try {
    const val = await get<unknown>(key);
    if (val && typeof val === 'object' && !Array.isArray(val)) {
      const out: FeatureFlags = {};
      for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(val as Record<string, unknown>)) out[k] = Boolean(v);
      return out;
    }
    return undefined;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

async function loadConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  if (!EDGE_CONFIG_ID) return { ...DEFAULTS };

  const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags] = await Promise.all([
    readString('API_KEY'),
    readString('DB_URL'),
    readFeatureFlags('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
  ]);

  return {
    apiKey: apiKey ?? DEFAULTS.apiKey,
    dbUrl: dbUrl ?? DEFAULTS.dbUrl,
    featureFlags: featureFlags ?? DEFAULTS.featureFlags,
  };
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const cfg = await loadConfig();

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const flagKey = url.searchParams.get('flag');

  const body = {
    edgeConfigPresent: Boolean(EDGE_CONFIG_ID),
    apiKey: cfg.apiKey,
    dbUrl: cfg.dbUrl,
    featureFlags: cfg.featureFlags,
    ...(flagKey ? { flag: flagKey, enabled: Boolean(cfg.featureFlags[flagKey]) } : {}),
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body, null, 2), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
  });
}
